glosses.ja: スカーフ; マフラー

sentences.target: Tu as pris mon foulard ce matin.
sentences.reading: /ty a pʁi mɔ̃ fulaʁ sə matɛ̃/

translations.fr: Tu as pris mon foulard ce matin.
translations.ipa: /ty a pʁi mɔ̃ fulaʁ sə matɛ̃/
translations.en: You took my scarf this morning.
translations.es: Te llevaste mi bufanda esta mañana.
translations.de: Du hast heute Morgen meinen Schal genommen.
translations.it: Hai preso la mia sciarpa stamattina.
translations.zh-Hans: 你今天早上拿了我的围巾。
translations.ru: Ты сегодня утром взял мой шарф.
translations.pt: Você pegou meu cachecol hoje de manhã.
translations.he: אתה לקחת את הצעיף שלי הבוקר.
translations.vi: Sáng nay bạn lấy khăn choàng của tôi.
translations.nl: Je hebt vanmorgen mijn sjaal gepakt.
translations.uk: Ти сьогодні вранці взяв мій шарф.
translations.hi: तुमने आज सुबह मेरा स्कार्फ लिया.
translations.el: Πήρες το κασκόλ μου σήμερα το πρωί.
translations.nb: Du tok skjerfet mitt i morges.
translations.sv: Du tog min halsduk i morse.
translations.ro: Ai luat fularul meu în această dimineață.
translations.cs: Dnes ráno jsi vzal mou šálu.
translations.da: Du tog mit tørklæde i morges.
translations.ja: 今朝、私のマフラーを持っていった。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun; informal; serves as the subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb (present indicative, 2nd person singular) used to form the passé composé with the past participle 'pris'.
Past participle of 'prendre'; main lexical verb in a compound tense with 'as'; selects a direct object.
Possessive determiner (masculine singular) modifying 'foulard', indicating possession by the speaker.
Common noun (masculine singular); head of the noun phrase; direct object of 'pris'.
Demonstrative determiner introducing the temporal noun 'matin'; forms the fixed temporal expression 'ce matin'.
Common noun (masculine singular); completes 'ce matin' and functions as an adverbial time modifier of the clause.

translations.en: Your scarf looks good on you.
translations.it: La tua sciarpa ti sta bene.
translations.pt: Seu cachecol fica bem em você.
translations.vi: Khăn choàng của bạn hợp với bạn lắm.
translations.hi: तुम पर तुम्हारा स्कार्फ अच्छा लगता है.
translations.ja: あなたのマフラーは似合ってる。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular possessive determiner (masculine singular) modifying 'foulard'.
Common noun (masculine singular); head of the noun phrase; serves as the subject of 'va'.
Clitic pronoun (2nd-person singular, dative/indirect object) preceding the verb; marks the affected person ('aller à quelqu’un' → 'suit you').
Main verb (present indicative, 3rd person singular) agreeing with 'foulard'; here meaning 'suits'.
Adverb modifying the verb 'va', indicating manner ('well').

sentences.target: On cherche un foulard pour ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ fulaʁ puʁ sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: On cherche un foulard pour ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ fulaʁ puʁ sə swaʁ/
translations.en: We’re looking for a scarf for tonight.
translations.es: Estamos buscando una bufanda para esta noche.
translations.de: Wir suchen einen Schal für heute Abend.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando una sciarpa per stasera.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤에 쓸 목도리를 찾고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在找今晚用的围巾。
translations.yue: 我哋喺搵今晚要用嘅頸巾。
translations.pt: Estamos procurando um cachecol para hoje à noite.
translations.tr: Bu akşam için bir atkı arıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm một chiếc khăn choàng cho tối nay.
translations.ar: نحن نبحث عن وشاح لهذا المساء.
translations.nl: We zoeken een sjaal voor vanavond.
translations.uk: Ми шукаємо шарф на сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hi: हम आज रात के लिए एक स्कार्फ ढूँढ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε για ένα κασκόλ για απόψε.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter et skjerf til i kveld.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari syal untuk malam ini.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter en halsduk till ikväll.
translations.da: Vi leder efter et tørklæde til i aften.
translations.ja: 今夜のためにマフラーを探している。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; colloquial 'we' or impersonal 'one'; serves as the subject of 'cherche' (3rd person singular).
Main verb (present indicative, 3rd person singular due to 'on'); transitive, taking 'un foulard' as direct object.
Indefinite article (masculine singular) introducing a new, non-specific referent 'foulard'.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition introducing a prepositional phrase expressing purpose/time reference.
Demonstrative determiner forming the temporal NP 'ce soir' ('this evening').
Common noun (masculine singular); object of the preposition 'pour'; temporal complement.

sentences.target: Je plie le foulard dans le tiroir.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pli lə fulaʁ dɑ̃ lə tiʁwaʁ/

translations.fr: Je plie le foulard dans le tiroir.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pli lə fulaʁ dɑ̃ lə tiʁwaʁ/
translations.en: I fold the scarf in the drawer.
translations.es: Doblo la bufanda en el cajón.
translations.de: Ich falte den Schal in der Schublade.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在抽屉里把围巾折好。
translations.yue: 我喺櫃桶入面摺好條頸巾。
translations.pt: Eu dobro o cachecol na gaveta.
translations.vi: Tôi gấp khăn choàng trong ngăn kéo.
translations.nl: Ik vouw de sjaal in de lade.
translations.hi: मैं दराज में स्कार्फ को मोड़ता हूँ.
translations.ja: 引き出しの中でマフラーをたたむ。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'plie'.
Main verb (present indicative, 1st person singular); transitive; denotes the action 'to fold'.
Definite article (masculine singular) marking a specific referent; modifies 'foulard'.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of 'plie'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase indicating where the action is performed.
Definite article (masculine singular) modifying 'tiroir'.
Common noun (masculine singular); object of the preposition 'dans'; indicates location.
